arts.ttl: Barcelona get GREAT NEWS over ‘best in world’ transfer
arts.sum: Juventus had earmarked the 25-year-old as a potential January recruit to solve their defensive crisis and the deal looked very close to getting over the line, yet now Sport reports that the transfer is virtually dead. Barcelona sporting director Deco has informed the player of the club’s decision not to allow him to depart at this point, and Araujo will therefore remain with the Camp Nou outfit until the summer.

The FC Barcelona president appears in a press conference after winning the Spanish Super Cup to explain the registration process for Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor. After the superlative victory over Real Madrid in the Spanish Super Cup there has been practically no time to rest, with a midweek game at home to Betis in the Copa del Rey (Wednesday 9pm CET).

arts.ttl: From Spain: Barcelona convince Araujo to snub Juventus
arts.sum: Mundo Deportivo reports that Barcelona have persuaded Ronald Araujo to snub a move to Juventus...

arts.ttl: Barcelona open to two sales in January window following transfer U-turn
arts.sum: Barcelona will swivel their transfer strategy this January transfer window, following the showdown talks between Sporting Director Deco and centre-back Ronald Araujo. With the Uruguayan now believed to be closer to staying at Barcelona, it will have consequences elsewhere in the squad. According to Sport, both Eric Garcia and Andreas Christensen will be made available […] The post Barcelona open to two sales in January window following transfer U-turn appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Ronald Araujo future: Barcelona centre-back 'makes decision on future' after 'opening Juventus offer'
arts.sum: Barcelona sporting director Deco reportedly talks Ronald Araujo into staying at the club amid firm interest from Italian giants Juventus.

arts.ttl: Juventus to give up on Barcelona’s Ronald Araujo despite readying €50m offer
arts.sum: Everything is coming up Barcelona over the last week, with Dani Olmo and Pau Victor receiving temporary permission to return to action, followed by wins over Athletic Club and Real Madrid in the Spanish Supercup. Now it looks like they will be able to hang onto star defender Ronald Araujo. The Uruguayan looked as if […] The post Juventus to give up on Barcelona’s Ronald Araujo despite readying €50m offer appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE: Lionel Messi in Barcelona 'loan return' from MLS
arts.sum: The January transfer market is now officially open, with clubs across Europe looking to get deals over the line to enhance their squads for the second half of the season. Teams are already working...

arts.ttl: Araujo to stay at Barca? Saga taks fresh twist after Deco talks
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano reports Araujo will NOT move this winter following a fresh round of talks with Deco and the club. Ronald Araujo may be set to stay at Barcelona after all after the saga regarding his future took a fresh turn on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: How Laporta the 'rascal' keeps Barcelona going as president
arts.sum: Against all odds and countless financial challenges, Joan Laporta is still standing, smiling, as Barcelona's club president. Underestimate him, and the club, at your peril.

arts.ttl: Wednesday's Copa del Rey predictions including Barcelona vs. Real Betis
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Copa del Rey fixtures, including Barcelona vs. Real Betis.
